title: Assembly Entry
description: Schema for an assembly-domain truth record. Each entry captures one assembly fact: a layered system definition, control-layer continuity rule, transition detail, penetration condition, or edge condition.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this assembly entry.

position.description: Layer position from exterior to interior (1 = outermost).

material_ref.description: Reference to a material entry ID in Construction_Material_Kernel.

layers.description: Ordered layer stack for this assembly.

interface_zones.description: Interface zone IDs from the shared registry that this assembly addresses.

control_layer_continuity.description: Map of control_layer_id to continuity status (continuous, interrupted, terminated, transitioned).
